---
title: "Archive"
phase: archive
audience: public
status: current
owner: docs
format: html
---

# Archive

This public archive is a curated pointer page. Raw scratch notes, historical
TODOs, and obsolete repository-structure drafts are kept under
`.agents/archive/docs/` so they remain available to agents without being
published as reader-facing documentation.

Current project direction lives in the [roadmap](../thesis/roadmap.qmd) and
[research questions](../thesis/questions.qmd). Active implementation work lives
in the `.agents/*.toml` backlog, and canonical terms live in the
[glossary](../glossary.qmd).
